security.summary: Security coverage complete for enabled detectors.

assessment_import_audit.attest: AI holistic review: single-file Python security utility (check-unicode-integrity.py) that scans advocacy instruction files for hidden Unicode backdoor characters. Genuinely excellent code — clean stdlib-only implementation, comprehensive type annotations, well-named functions, specific error handling, zero external dependencies. 29 pytest tests cover all public functions. Scored conservatively on test_strategy (86) due to coverage detection limitation with importlib, package_organization (90) due to simple single-file structure, and advocacy_ux_inclusivity (88) due to CLI-only interface.
